title: 🔴 CRITICAL: Missing Module metrics_cached Blocks Compilation
description: The backend fails to compile due to missing module declaration. File backend/src/api/mod.rs:20 references pub mod metrics_cached but the file doesn't exist.
impact: Blocks all backend compilation, prevents development and deployment, CI/CD pipeline fails
solution: Either create backend/src/api/metrics_cached.rs with basic implementation OR remove the module declaration from mod.rs

title: 🔴 CRITICAL: Mismatched Closing Delimiter in database.rs
description: Syntax error with unclosed async block in execute_with_timing call around line 1504
impact: Blocks backend compilation and all development
solution: Locate execute_with_timing call and ensure all braces/brackets/parentheses are properly matched

title: 🔴 CRITICAL: Unclosed Delimiter in Analytics Contract
description: Contract contains unclosed delimiter preventing compilation
impact: Blocks analytics contract deployment and testing
solution: Review contract for unclosed braces, brackets, or parentheses using IDE bracket matching

title: 🔴 CRITICAL: Multiple Compilation Errors in stellar-insights Contract
solution: Run cargo clippy --package stellar-insights --all-targets to see detailed errors and fix systematically

title: 🔴 CRITICAL: Access Control Contract Compilation Errors
description: 9 compilation errors in access control contract
solution: Run cargo clippy --package access-control --all-targets and fix errors
